title: ouratea zeylanica
intro: Ouratea zeylanica, also known as the Sri Lankan Ouratea, is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ouratea zeylanica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Ouratea zeylanica include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
